l:dependency.name: Woodstox Core API Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: The Jenkins Plugins Parent POM Project

l:dependency.name: Stax2 API
l:dependency.l:description: Stax2 API is an extension to basic Stax 1.0 API that adds significant new functionality, such as full-featured bi-direction validation interface and high-performance Typed Access API.

l:dependency.name: Woodstox
l:dependency.l:description: Woodstox is a high-performance XML processor that implements Stax (JSR-173), SAX2 and Stax2 APIs
